name: RhinoInsight — control mechanisms for context (arXiv 2511.18743)
context_primitives: Nov 2025 framework (DeepLang/Tsinghua) attacking **context rot** in deep research agents via: (1) **Verifiable checklist**—requirements → sub-goals + critic + hierarchical outline; (2) **Evidence audit**—structure search results, prune noise, rank/bind evidence to draft sections. No weight updates; SOTA on deep research tasks per paper. Inspired structured skills like Weizhena/Deep-Research-skills.
deployment_pattern: Human-in-the-loop outline approval; evidence-bound writing; prune before each model call—complements rather than replaces truncation.
benchmarks_eval_alignment: Paper reports deep-research and deep-search benchmarks; different from Alex's 10→11 turn session eval but same **test before user sees failure** ethos.
differentiators: vs. **Alex**: RhinoInsight controls **what enters research drafts** via checklists/audit; Alex controls **telemetry volume** via truncation/sub-agents. Both reject unbounded linear accumulation. RhinoInsight is **process control**; Alex is **storage geometry + delegation**.
significance_for_builders: Combine: RhinoInsight-style **outline + evidence** for research/report agents; Alex-style **head/tail + recall** for tool-heavy ops agents.
